title: Synth Bass Drop Impact
author: AlexLane
modifications: Fetched the public hq.mp3 preview from the Freesound CDN. Master WAV (96kHz/24-bit) on source page if needed. Trim decay to ~200ms and normalize to -24 dB peak inside apply-sfx.mjs at runtime. Moog Sub 37 fundamental — should sit in the 40-60 Hz range the persona asks for.
